properties.Observation: The entire canal is about one kilometer long. The first section has been concreted, but approximately four hundred meters still need to be newly concreted. About ten acres of paddy fields are cultivated with the water of this canal.

properties.Scheme: Mul Amuna canal at Kotagepitiya Gama Meda Division
properties.Observation: Currently, no formal anicut has been constructed and a fence has been laid across the stones. The canal is concreted and is dilapidated in places. Command area = 12 acres
